title: Building developer environment on my laptop too build an app

posts.author: mvr_25 (Vignesh Reddy M)
posts.cookedHtml:
Iam participating in monday apps-hackathon challenge.
I want to start building my app but, i could not create development environment (mentioned in resources>build your apps) in my laptop
I mean i followed the same procedure,

Screenshot (277)1920×1080 213 KB

please help me!!!

posts.cookedHtml: Sorry for missing your message! Is the issue still occurring for you?
